---
title: "Track III: Transform and model"
format: html
---

# Instructions

For this final milestone, apply what you have learned about data transformation and modeling to further explore the hotel bookings data set. Consider the following steps:

1. Read in your data
2. Wrangle your data so it is in a format that is ready for modeling
3. Create a simple regression model and inspect your model results using functions from the broom package

For example, you might fit a logistic regression model that uses the lead time of a booking, the origin of the traveler, and the type of hotel to predict the probability that a reservation is canceled.

To learn more about the variables contained in the data set, refer to the data dictionary: https://rsacdn.link/milestones/internal/v2/hotel-cancelations/assets/hotels_dictionary.html

# Milestone

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

# loading packages
library(tidyverse)
```

## Transform and model
